title: Full Slabs
description: Adds vertical slabs and mixed horizontal and vertical slabs to Minecraft.
body:
# Full Slabs

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/OwqCl3JJ?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-slabs)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/449430?logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/full-slabs)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.10-success)
![Loaders](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loaders-Fabric%20%7C%20NeoForge-blue)
![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-lightgrey)
![Requires Architectury](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Architectury_API-informational)
![Requires MidnightLib](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-MidnightLib-informational)

Vertical slabs and mixed slabs for modern Minecraft.

---

## Features
- Vertical slabs that **just work** — no new recipes or crafting steps.
- Mixed slabs: two different slabs in one block space, with per-half breaking (KleeSlabs-style).
- Single codebase for both loaders through Architectury.
- Additional compatibility added for Mo Glass and Blockus.
  > Note: Mo Glass slabs cannot be mixed.

---

## Gallery
![Placement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Micalobia/Full-Slabs/refs/tags/v4.0.0/media/placement.gif)
---

## How it plays
- **Placement modes:** cycle between three placement modes to control how halves place.  
  Bind in **Controls → Key Binds → Full Slabs → Cycle Placement Mode**.
- **Overlay:** a lightweight overlay shows which halves will be placed or broken.  
  Bind in **Controls → Key Binds → Full Slabs → Toggle Overlay**.

If you’ve used “vertical slab only” mods before, Full Slabs maintains that simplicity and adds mixing and interaction affordances on top, without recipe clutter.

---

## Compatibility
- **Minecraft:** 1.21.10
- **Loaders:** Fabric, NeoForge (via Architectury)
- **Required:** Architectury API, MidnightLib
- **Optional notes:**
    - **Mo Glass:** supported, but Mo Glass slabs cannot be mixed.
    - **Blockus:** extra variants and behavior where appropriate.
- **Not supported:** OptiFine / OptiFabric

---

## Install
**Recommended:** Install via the **Modrinth App** — open the [Full Slabs page](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-slabs) and click **Install**. It will bring the mod in with dependencies and keep it updated.

---
